title: practical english usage - Part 278
content:
They aren't ready.       I haven't seen him  for ages.

(auxiliary) verb 4- not vocabulary •  337    contractions: I'll, don't, etc I'm late, aren't I?

2   Am  not is only normally contracted in questions to aren't (/ɑ:nt/).

1    Do  not confuse it's (= it is/has) and its (possessive).

The  following are some of the most common and useful English prefixes 338 prefix    es  and   suffixes 7   May not is not normally contracted: mayn't is very rare.
